headline: Exchange Traded Concepts Announces Launch of xETFs NVDA Daily Income ETF (NYSE: NYYY) and xETFs TSLA Daily Income ETF (NYSE: TYYY) with xETFs
summary: Exchange Traded Concepts, LLC ("ETC") today announced, in conjunction with xETFs, the launch of the xETFs NVDA Daily Income ETF (NYSE: NYYY) and the xETFs TSLA Daily Income ETF (NYSE: TYYY), actively managed exchange-traded funds that seek to provide exposure to the price movements of NVDA and TSLA, respectively, while generating current income through a daily synthetic covered call strategy. The Funds began trading on the New York Stock Exchange ARCA on May 15, 2026.
